_note: Synthetic vectors authored by the ORACLE method: inputs are real Milesight EM320-TILT channel/type TLV frames (battery 0x01/0x75, angle 0x03/0xd4); expected.data is derived from the faithful port in codec.js (a re-author of the upstream Apache-2.0 decoder) and cross-checked against the upstream example output. The 0x03/0xd4 angle channel carries a per-axis tilt threshold-CHANGE alarm in the low bit of each raw word -> action.motion.detected; angle (raw>>1)/100 deg -> angleX/angleY/angleZ extras; battery percent -> batteryPercent extra.

uplink.description: Battery + angle with Y-axis tilt alarm triggered (upstream example input)
Battery + angle, no axis triggered (motion.detected false)
Angle channel only, negative X tilt angle, no alarm
Battery-only uplink (no angle channel, no motion emitted)
